# Research notes

Early sweep of the problem space. One readable artifact so the research stage is not empty, while
the decide and build phases stay honestly pending.

- Prior art: mid-pipeline checkpoints reduce rework when they surface a single, unambiguous signal.
- Open question: what is the one signal worth interrupting the team for?
